statement.headerDoc:
CollatzRei.Paper160InversionDeconstruction —
  Application note for Paper 160 §X (Rei-AIOS):
  Distinguishing involution (single NOT) from idempotent collapse (Ω_upper)
  on the D-FUMT₈ value system.

  Core claim (chat Claude 2026-06-01, three-instance convergence with
  ChatGPT and Gemini, see paper-160-figA-thread-synthesis-en-2026-06-01.svg
  for the research-log of the multi-AI thread):

      "Reversal ≠ Deconstruction"

      NOT(NOT(x)) preserves the underlying axis (involution);
      only Ω_upper(Ω_upper(x)) folds the axis itself (idempotent collapse).

  This file machine-checks (de

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: Zero-sorry verified by lake env lean
